introLines.text: Vern, I've been seeing the same craft for ten years. Same location. Same time of year. It's not random.
This isn't my first sighting. It's my fourteenth. I've documented every single one.
I know how this sounds, but I think they're watching me. Coming back to the same spot, year after year.

detailLines.text: Every October, between the 15th and 20th. Same triangular craft. Same flight pattern. I've mapped it.
The first time I thought I was crazy. By the fifth time, I started keeping detailed records. Times, weather, witnesses.
Last year I set up cameras. Three angles. Got forty minutes of footage before it disappeared.

defenseLines.text: Ten years of documentation, Vern. Photographs, video, journal entries. You can't dismiss a decade of evidence.
I've had the footage analyzed. No signs of manipulation. Whatever this is, it's real.
Other people in my area have seen it too. We've formed a group. Twelve witnesses over the years.

acceptanceLines.text: Thank you. Most people think I'm obsessed. Maybe I am. But I'm not wrong.
That means more than you know. My family stopped believing me years ago.
I knew if anyone would take this seriously, it would be you.

extraDetailLines.text: I've noticed patterns in the timing. It correlates with certain astronomical events. I don't think that's coincidence.
The last three appearances, there's been a hum. Low frequency. You feel it more than hear it. My equipment picked it up.
I've reached out to researchers at two universities. One is interested. The other stopped returning my calls after I sent the footage.

extraDefenseLines.text: I'm an engineer, Vern. I've spent my career solving problems with data. This data is undeniable.
I've invited skeptics to my property during the observation window. Three have seen it themselves. Changed their minds.
Whatever this is, it wants to be seen. It comes back to the same place. That's not random behavior.

conclusionLines.text: October's coming, Vern. If you want to see for yourself, I'll send you coordinates.
Ten years I've been waiting for someone to take this seriously. Thank you.
Keep watching the skies. Especially in October.
